categories.title: COUNTRY CODE TOP-LEVEL DOMAINS
categories.theme: Each clue asks which region/country uses a specific internet country code (e.g. '.in', '.sa'); answers are the corresponding country or region

clues.clue: This South Asian nation, home to over a billion people, claims the internet country code '.in'.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally reads 'Which region of the world uses .in at the end of its web addresses?' and source answer is 'India'.

clues.clue: The two-letter code '.sa' belongs to this kingdom on the Arabian Peninsula.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally reads 'Which region of the world uses .sa at the end of its web addresses?' and source answer is 'Saudi Arabia'.

clues.clue: The code '.pa' is assigned to this Central American nation, famous for its canal.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally reads 'Which region of the world uses .pa at the end of its web addresses?' and source answer is 'Panama'.

clues.clue: Websites ending in '.ma' belong to this North African kingdom.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally reads 'Which region of the world uses .ma at the end of its web addresses?' and source answer is 'Morocco'.

clues.clue: The internet suffix '.ss' was assigned to this East African nation, the world's newest country as of 2011.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally reads 'Which region of the world uses .ss at the end of its web addresses?' and source answer is 'South Sudan'.

categories.title: WORLD CAPITALS
categories.theme: Each answer is the capital city of a named country

clues.clue: This city on the banks of the Tiber River serves as the capital of Italy.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What is the capital city of Italy?' and source answer is 'Rome', a capital city.

clues.clue: This Indonesian capital, home to over 10 million people, sits on the northwest coast of Java.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What is the capital city of Indonesia?' and source answer is 'Jakarta', a capital city.

clues.clue: This South American capital city shares its name with a famous Uruguayan football club.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What is the capital city of Uruguay?' and source answer is 'Montevideo', a capital city.

clues.clue: Located on the White Nile, this city is the capital of Africa's third-largest country by area.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What is the capital city of Sudan?' and source answer is 'Khartoum', a capital city.

clues.clue: This tiny capital is the seat of government of a West African island nation whose largest island is São Tiago.
clues.fit_justification: Source question asks 'What is the capital city of Cabo Verde?' and source answer is 'Praia', a capital city.

finals.title: FAMOUS WATERWAYS
finals.clue: This 50-mile waterway stretches from Limon Bay on the Caribbean Sea to the Bridge of the Americas on the Pacific Ocean, connecting two great oceans.
finals.fit_justification: Source question literally reads 'What is the name of the 50-mile waterway that stretches from Limon Bay on the Caribbean to the Bridge of the Americas on the Pacific Ocean?' and source answer is 'The Panama Canal'.
